'''Shren Whist''' was the [[Proconsul]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Caprioril]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==History==
A native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Caprioril]], Shren Whist was the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Proconsul]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], a growing movement which plagued the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. During this time the [[Ratts Tyerell Foundation/Legends|Ratts Tyerell Foundation]] were successful in their lobbying efforts to ban [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] on the planet; Whist personally addressed the populace and announced the closing of the [[Doolis Podrace Arena]].<ref name="HNN45" />
